basic_details.job_title: ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has published the Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification at ACTREC official Website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Assistant Research Fellow position. Candidates and holding BDS/BAMS with PG Diploma in Clinical Research or Pharm D qualification are eligible to apply. The application process will be conducted through a walk-in interview on 07 July 2026, and candidates can directly attend as per the official notification details. The notification PDF and further instructions are available in the offic

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: BDS/BAMS with PG Diploma in Clinical Research OR Pharm D.
qualification.details: BDS/BAMS with PG Diploma in Clinical Research Pharm D. Prior Research Experience in Palliative Medicine is desirable.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs.75,000/- P.M. for six months, extendable.

rows.advanced_centre_for_treatment_research_a: BDS/BAMS with PG Diploma in Clinical Research OR Pharm D.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: BDS/BAMS with PG Diploma in Clinical Research Pharm D. Prior Research Experience in Palliative Medicine is desirable.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Consolidated salary of Rs.75,000/- P.M. for six months, extendable.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Assistant Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the ACTREC recruitment is Assistant Research Fellow. This is a project-based research position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by ACTREC?
faq.answer: ACTREC has released a total of 1 vacancy for the Assistant Research Fellow position through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BDS/BAMS degree with a PG Diploma in Clinical Research, or a Pharm D. Prior research experience in Palliative Medicine is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs.75,000/- Per Month for an initial period of six months, which is extendable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Interested candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q6. When and where is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for Tuesday, 07th July 2026, at Meeting Room No. II, 3rd Floor, Khanolkar Shodhika, ACTREC, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai - 410210.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their recent CV, passport-size photograph, and original and xerox copies of all certificates (Educational Qualifications, Work Experience, and Aadhaar Card as ID proof).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Assistant Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The job type for the Assistant Research Fellow post is Project-based, indicating it is for a specific research project.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of ACTREC?
faq.answer: The official website of Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) is www.actrec.gov.in, where you can find more information.
